name: container-egress-catrust
description: Close the Phase-3 deferred egress blocker: does the CF container ephemeral-CA trust recipe (copy /etc/cloudflare/certs/cloudflare-containers-ca.crt + update-ca-certificates) let an allow-listed HTTPS host (git clone / curl) succeed through interceptHttps egress — under LOCAL wrangler dev on Docker Desktop? Stand-in host = github.com; the Artifacts pull (*.artifacts.cloudflare.net) is the same mechanism. See tasks/nebula-dev-flows.md.
